2605.05866.title: XDecomposer: Learning Prior-Free Set Decomposition for Multiphase X-ray Diffraction
2605.05866.paper_summary: Multiphase powder X-ray diffraction (PXRD) analysis remains a fundamental bottleneck in structure identification, as real-world synthesis often produces complex mixtures whose constituent phases (components) cannot be reliably disentangled. While recent advances in representation-based crystal retrieval and generation suggest the possibility of inferring structures directly from PXRD, existing approaches largely assume single-phase inputs and break down in multiphase settings. Here, we present XDecomposer, a prior-free framework for joint decomposition and identification of multiphase XRD patterns without requiring candidate phase lists, structural templates, or prior knowledge of phase number. We formulate multiphase diffraction analysis as a set prediction problem, where the model infers an unordered set of phase-resolved components, their mixture proportions, and corresponding structural representations within a unified architecture. A phase-query-driven decomposition mechanism, together with diffraction-consistent physical reconstruction, enables accurate source separation while preserving crystallographic fidelity. Extensive experiments on both simulated and experimental datasets show that XDecomposer substantially improves reconstruction accuracy and phase identification across diverse chemical systems, while maintaining strong generalization to unseen mixtures. These results provide a practical route toward data-driven, source-resolved multiphase XRD analysis and reduce long-standing dependence on prior-guided iteratively phase matching. The code is openly available at https://github.com/Licht0812/XDecomposer
2605.05866.paper_summary_zh: 多相粉末 X 射線衍射 (PXRD) 分析仍然是結構識別中的一個基本瓶頸，因為現實世界的合成通常產生複雜的混合物，其組成相 (成分) 無法可靠地分離。雖然最近在基於表示的晶體檢索和生成方面的進展暗示了直接從 PXRD 推斷結構的可能性，但現有的方法大多假設單相輸入，並在多相環境中失效。在這裡，我們提出了 XDecomposer，一個無需先驗的框架，用於多相 XRD 圖案的聯合分解和識別，而不需要候選相列表、結構模板或相數的先驗知識。我們將多相衍射分析公式化為一個集合預測問題，其中模型推斷一組無序的相解析組件、它們的混合比例以及在統一架構內的相應結構表示。一個基於相查詢的分解機制，加上與衍射一致的物理重建，使得準確的源分離成為可能，同時保持晶體學的保真度。在模擬和實驗數據集上的大量實驗顯示，XDecomposer 顯著提高了重建精度和相識別能力，涵蓋了多種化學系統，同時對未見混合物保持了強大的泛化能力。這些結果提供了一條實用的途徑，朝向數據驅動的、源解析的多相 XRD 分析，並減少了對先驗引導的迭代相匹配的長期依賴。代碼可在 https://github.com/Licht0812/XDecomposer 獲得。
2605.05866.author: Hanyu Gao et.al.
2605.05866.authors: Hanyu Gao, Bin Cao, Yunyue Su, Tong-Yi Zhang, Qiang Liu
